pi_items.source: HTTP request verification - website returns HTTP 200 with valid HTML content
Direct URL extraction from crawler-test.com homepage - counted 427 unique URLs/links in href attributes
HTTP GET https://crawler-test.com/mobile/separate_desktop returns HTTP 200; multiple mobile test pages exist
HTTP GET https://crawler-test.com/links/broken_links_internal returns HTTP 200; multiple links test pages exist
HTTP GET https://crawler-test.com/content/above_min_content_volume returns HTTP 200; multiple content test pages exist
HTTP GET https://crawler-test.com/javascript/window-location-internal returns HTTP 200; multiple JavaScript test pages exist

privileged_info_summary: The task crawls https://crawler-test.com/, a real, publicly accessible SEO testing website. The website contains 427+ unique URLs organized in sections including mobile (20+ pages), links (25+ pages), content (40+ pages), and javascript (15+ pages). The minimum URL discovery target of 10 is conservative; the site is easily crawlable and contains far more discoverable pages. All metadata claims are verified as correct.
